form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, ran last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on January 31 over 1400m, 6 len behind Majestic Dane with 54kg at $17. Second-up 3rd of 10 at Wolverhampton on March 23 over 1700m, 9 len behind Estissa with 56kg at $67. Coming along well and can win without surprising.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at Newmarket (July) July 18 over 1400m, a head behind True Test carrying 58kg at $2.90. On debut second in a small field at Haydock Park July 4 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Tavana carrying 58kg at $5.50. Must be respected on what we have seen to date.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Leicester October 7 over 1600m, 5 len behind Trio carrying 58kg at $3.80. On debut third of 10 at Haydock Park September 5 over 1600m, 7 len behind Legacy Link carrying 58kg at $51. Likely to return bigger and better this prep.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Newbury October 25 over 1600m, soft track; 6 len behind A La Prochaine with 58kg at $13. On debut fourth of 9 at Wolverhampton September 2 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Ghaadah with 58kg at $3.80. Will improve on what she does here.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Not seen since she finished last of 11 at Bath October 30 over 1600m, soft track; 46 len behind Arc Ole Ole carrying 58kg at $12. On debut third in a small field at Redcar October 4 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Pandemonium with 56.5kg at $23. Will benefit greatly from this hitout.
